name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: An income support scheme providing ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers holding cultivable land up to 2 hectares. Excludes institutional landholders, professionals (doctors, engineers), and taxpayers.

name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
description: Provides a health insurance cover of up to ₹5 Lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
eligibility: Targeted at poor, deprived rural families and identified occupational categories of urban workers based on SECC 2011 data.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to a rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
eligibility: Must be a citizen of India, 18 years of age or older, and part of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual labor.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Provides LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
eligibility: Applicant must be a woman above 18 years of age. The household should belong to the BPL category and must not already have an LPG connection.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Aims to provide a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless households and those living in kutcha and dilapidated houses in rural areas.
eligibility: Houseless households or those with houses having zero, one, or two rooms with a kutcha wall and roof as per SECC data.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
eligibility: Parents or legal guardians can open an account in the name of a girl child below the age of 10 years.
documents_required: Birth Certificate of the girl child

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: A national mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, basic savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen aged 10 years and above who does not already have a bank account.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card (serves as identity and address proof)
If Aadhaar is not available: Voter ID, Driving License, PAN card, or NREGA card

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: A pension scheme focused mainly on the unorganized sector to provide a guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60.
eligibility: Indian citizens between 18 and 40 years of age with a valid bank account.

name: e-Shram Portal Registration
description: Creation of a National Database of Unorganized Workers (NDUW) to deliver social security benefits to unorganized workers.
eligibility: Any unorganized worker between 16 and 59 years of age. Must not be a member of EPFO/ESIC or a regular government employee.

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP - Old Age Pension)
description: Provides financial assistance to the elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities from below poverty line households.
eligibility: Applicant must be a destitute and belong to a BPL household. For old age pension, age must be 60 years or above.

name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
description: A special micro-credit facility for street vendors to access affordable working capital loans to resume their livelihoods.
eligibility: All street vendors engaged in vending in urban areas as on or before March 24, 2020.
documents_required: Certificate of Vending / Identity Card issued by Urban Local Bodies (ULBs)

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans between 10 lakh and 1 Crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
eligibility: SC/ST and/or woman entrepreneurs, above 18 years of age. The enterprise must be in manufacturing, services, or the trading sector.

name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 Lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity such as manufacturing, processing, trading or service sector.
